source: https://royalti-io.github.io/ikenga-registry/index.json — committed fallback so CF Pages builds never break on registry downtime

pkgs.name: @ikenga/mcp-browser
pkgs.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that lets agents drive native child webviews in the Ikenga desktop app — open a pane on a partner portal (Spotify-for-Artists, Bandcamp, Linkfire, etc.), snapshot it, click, fill, and wait. Bypasses iframe CSP `frame-ancestors` by using the system webview.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/mcp-iyke
pkgs.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes the Ikenga desktop app's iyke control bridge — drive a running Tauri AI workspace from any MCP client (Claude, Cursor, etc.).

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-browser
pkgs.description: Playwright verb engine behind Ikenga's /iyke/browser/* contract — replaces the Rust chromiumoxide Chrome engine (ADR-018). Managed (dedicated profile) + Attach (everyday Chrome via the official Playwright extension).

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-content
pkgs.description: Content — Pipeline (kanban + list), Calendar, Published over the production content schema. Multi-file iframe pkg; deterministic CSS vendoring build.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-engine-claude-code
pkgs.description: Claude Code engine adapter for Ikenga — wraps the `claude` CLI as the default AI engine.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-engine-codex
pkgs.description: Codex CLI engine adapter for Ikenga — install-time portability for the OpenAI `codex` CLI (ADR-012 Track C).

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-engine-cursor-agent
pkgs.description: Cursor agent CLI engine adapter for Ikenga (scaffold-only; runtime stubbed per ADR-013 Phase 4).

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-engine-gemini
pkgs.description: Gemini CLI engine adapter for Ikenga.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-engine-noop
pkgs.description: No-op engine adapter for Ikenga — proves the engine pluggability pattern; used as a test fixture and for shell-without-AI mode.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-finance
pkgs.description: Finance — Overview / Transactions / Receivables / Inter-Company / Reports over the production finance schema. Multi-file iframe pkg; deterministic CSS vendoring build.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-hello
pkgs.description: Minimal Ikenga pkg — proves the registry install pipeline end-to-end without bringing any UI, sidecar, or MCP surface.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-mail
pkgs.description: Mail — Inbox, Triage, All, Drafts over the production mail schema. No-build iframe pkg; deterministic CSS vendoring build.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-outbound
pkgs.description: Outbound — Email, Newsletter, Sequences, Social channels over the production outbound schema. No-build iframe pkg; deterministic CSS vendoring build.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-research
pkgs.description: Research — Reports (list+detail), Sources (monitored register), Personas (ICP grid) over the research_notes + research_sources schema. Multi-file iframe pkg; deterministic CSS vendoring build.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-sales
pkgs.description: Sales — Pipeline, Forecast, Won over the production sales schema. Multi-file iframe pkg; deterministic CSS vendoring build.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-strategy
pkgs.description: Strategy — OKR board (board + list), Cycles, Reviews over the production strategy schema. Multi-file iframe pkg; deterministic CSS vendoring build.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-tasks
pkgs.description: Tasks — List, Agenda, Triage over the production tasks schema. Multi-file iframe pkg; deterministic CSS vendoring build.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/skill-thunderbird
pkgs.description: Thunderbird mail skill — read/search the local Thunderbird mbox store and save reply drafts to the IMAP server.
